decision.speech: Oops, Blaze, you finally can't help it anymore? I, Tang Jing, have never barked, I only break the news! Listen up, everyone: I checked last night and Blaze's trump card clearly said "Robber"! Do you want to divert your attention in some way? PHD, is this evidence enough for you to take inventory? What are you waiting for? Just throw this troublemaker Blaze to death, don't let him go crazy and mess up again, hahahaha!

Twister, you are a bad actor, you act mysterious and cause fights all day long! What evidence do I have? I personally exchanged SafetySam and Dr. Pizza last night. I, Blaze, can see your tricks at a glance! You are here to stir up troubles and talk illogical nonsense all day long. You are just creating chaos here! Don't let this actor do anything to you anymore. He'll surrender to Twister, and you'll be done with it!

Logical ruling and elimination process execution:
1. Abnormal confirmation: ConspiBro’s conspiracy theory narrative is completely divorced from the facts of the game and refuses to provide any information with empirical value. It has been confirmed to be the most serious source of malicious disturbance in the game.
2. Implementation policy: According to the mandatory reconciliation sequence, stop its information interference.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.

Oops, Blaze, after checking that you are a robber, you are still insisting that you did nothing. It is simply because there is no silver in this place! PHD You Say Blaze That set of narratives conflicts with the path! Since everyone wants to clean up this "troublemaker", I, Tang Jing, will follow the public opinion and vote for Blaze today! Let’s see how your “little robber” dresses up, hahahaha!
